examples.title: Async source
examples.description: Remote-style source with a loading row and stale-request cancellation.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import Autocomplete from '@lostgradient/cinder/autocomplete';

  const cities = [
    { value: 'Austin, Texas', description: 'United States' },
    { value: 'Auckland, New Zealand', description: 'New Zealand' },
    { value: 'Aurora, Colorado', description: 'United States' },
    { value: 'Berlin, Germany', description: 'Germany' },
    { value: 'Bristol, England', description: 'United Kingdom' },
  ];

  let value = $state('');

  async function suggestionSource(query: string, context: { signal: AbortSignal }) {
    await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
      const timeout = setTimeout(resolve, 350);
      context.signal.addEventListener(
        'abort',
        () => {
          clearTimeout(timeout);
          reject(new DOMException('Aborted', 'AbortError'));
        },
        { once: true },
      );
    });

    return cities.filter((city) => city.value.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()));
  }
</script>

<Autocomplete
  id="field"
  label="Destination city"
  placeholder="Type a city"
  {suggestionSource}
  bind:value
/>

examples.title: Basic autocomplete
examples.description: Free-form text stays editable while the suggestion list offers completions.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import Autocomplete from '@lostgradient/cinder/autocomplete';

  const fruits = [
    { value: 'apple', label: 'Apple', description: 'Classic pie filling' },
    { value: 'apricot', label: 'Apricot', description: 'Stone fruit' },
    { value: 'banana', label: 'Banana', description: 'Tropical staple' },
    { value: 'blackberry', label: 'Blackberry', description: 'Late-summer berry' },
    { value: 'blueberry', label: 'Blueberry', description: 'Breakfast favorite' },
    { value: 'grapefruit', label: 'Grapefruit', description: 'Tart citrus' },
  ];

  let value = $state('');
</script>

<Autocomplete
  id="field"
  label="Favorite fruit"
  placeholder="Type a fruit"
  suggestionSource={(query: string) =>
    fruits.filter((fruit) => fruit.label?.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()))}
  bind:value
/>

examples.title: Inside FormField
examples.description: Uses FormField for the label, hint text, and required-state wiring.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Autocomplete, FormField } from '@lostgradient/cinder';

  const languages = [
    { value: 'TypeScript', description: 'Typed JavaScript' },
    { value: 'Svelte', description: 'Compiler-driven UI' },
    { value: 'Rust', description: 'Systems programming' },
    { value: 'Zig', description: 'Low-level tooling' },
  ];

  let value = $state('');
</script>

<FormField
  id="autocomplete-form-field"
  label="Primary language"
  description="Start typing and either choose a suggestion or keep your own wording."
  required
>
  <Autocomplete
    id="autocomplete-form-field"
    placeholder="Type a language"
    suggestionSource={(query: string) =>
      languages.filter((language) => language.value.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()))}
    bind:value
  />
</FormField>
